title: Spade's Creator Pack
description: Creator focused pack that boost performance, enhances visuals & adds quality of life mods.
body:
**Spade's Creator Pack is simply a collection of mods that keeps the basic vanilla Minecraft experience, but with Content Creation as a focus. It does this by optimizes your game for maximum FPS, enhances the visuals, adds quality of life features and has creator mods such as Flashback.**

## **Key Features:**
- Performance: By using Sodium, Lithium, Noisium and ImmediatelyFast your game will have improved frame rates, less lag, and optimizes chunk loading.

- Creator Mods: Upgrade your content with Flashback, Status, Armor Poser and Signed Painting mods.
  
- Visuals & Graphics: Enhance your visuals with Iris (shaders), Bobby (Increase Render Distance) Continuity (Connected Textures), LambDynamicLights (Dynamic Lights), Simple Fog Control and Fresh Animations.

- Efficiency: Mods like Entity Culling, More Culling and ferritecore ensure your system runs efficiently by minimizing unnecessary rendering and resource usage.

- Quality of Life Features include: Simple Voice Chat, Gamma Utils, Item Scroller, Sodium Extras, Trade Cycling, Zoomify, and Tweakeroo.

- Useful Tools: Build easier with Axiom, World Edit and Litematica. Use Minihud to display infomation, like light levels.

- Included Texture Packs: By using the Low on Fire, Redstone Tweaks, Small Shield & Totem, Unobtrusive Weather texture packs it improves the visuals.
  
The modpack comes preloaded with my own personal settings for each mod to remove the need to config them.

## **Modpack Origin**
Throughout my years of creating Minecraft content, I've slowly put together this modpack. Each mod included is one that I found either boosted performance, improved the visuals, was useful or built for creators.

If you're looking for a modpack without the extra content creator mods, use [Spade's Vanilla+](<https://modrinth.com/modpack/spades-vanilla+>).

## **Support or Issues?**
If you encounter any issues or need assistance, join my [Discord](https://discord.gg/uZQcxZNqcd) server. Open a support ticket, and either a moderator or I will try to help you.
